title: Datadog の 503 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Most technical claims regarding Datadog commands, configurations, and general 503 causes are accurate and supported by official documentation or reliable sources.
The article incorrectly states that Datadog API rate limits typically return a 503 error; the correct status code is 429.
Some claims, particularly comparative statements about New Relic's stability, lack concrete, unbiased primary sources.
The references to specific GitHub issues are relevant and directly linked, enhancing credibility for those specific points.
no URLs resolved to known official domains

sources.title: 503 Service Unavailable - HTTP - MDN Web Docs
sources.claim: Datadog で 503 エラーが発生した場合、Datadog のサーバー側が一時的に機能していないか、メンテナンス中、または過負荷状態にあることを示しています。 (When a 503 error occurs in Datadog, it indicates that the Datadog server side is temporarily non-functional, under maintenance, or overloaded.)

sources.title: 503 Errors from Datadog Remote Configuration · Issue #11632 · kumahq/kuma - GitHub
sources.claim: [kumahq/kuma#11632](https://github.com/kumahq/kuma/issues/11632) では、プロキシ経由での通信時にコネクションが適切にリセットされず、503 が継続的に返されるケースが報告されています。 (In kumahq/kuma#11632, cases where 503s are continuously returned due to improper connection resets during proxy communication are reported.)

unsupported_claims: 特に、複数環境を運用している場合に API キーを誤設定することが多くあります。 (Especially, API keys are often misconfigured when operating multiple environments.)
Datadog エージェントの実行中のバージョンが古い場合、API の仕様変更により 503 が返される可能性があります。 (If the running version of the Datadog Agent is old, a 503 may be returned due to API specification changes.)
短時間に大量のリクエストを送信すると、Datadog API のレート制限に抵触し、503 が返される場合があります。 (If a large number of requests are sent in a short period, it may hit Datadog API rate limits and return a 503.)

New Relic：UI が直感的で、可観測性機能が充実しています。503 エラーの頻度が低く、サービスの安定性が高いという報告があります。 (New Relic: intuitive UI, rich observability features. Reported to have a low frequency of 503 errors and high service stability.)
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.
Optional improvement: Correct the information regarding Datadog API rate limit status codes (should be 429, not 503).
Optional improvement: Add more specific citations for claims about API key misconfiguration frequency and old agent versions causing 503s, or rephrase them as common observations or best practices.
Optional improvement: Rephrase or remove the unsubstantiated claim about New Relic's 'low frequency of 503 errors and high service stability' unless a credible, unbiased source can be provided.
Optional improvement: Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Optional improvement: Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.
